items.title: Compose selection as a Pipeline step
items.avoid: Fitting selectors in notebooks on the full dataframe, then passing sliced arrays to a separate model object.
items.prefer: Single `Pipeline` with preprocessing, selector, and estimator; persist with `joblib` for serving.
items.why: Guarantees the same transforms and column mask at train and inference time.

items.title: Use nested or held-out validation for subset size
items.avoid: Picking k by scanning test accuracy for k in range(5, 100).
items.prefer: `RFECV`, `GridSearchCV` on pipeline params, or a fixed validation fold chosen before model selection.
items.why: Prevents optimistic bias when choosing how many features to ship.
items.example: `RFECV(estimator=pipe, cv=5, scoring='average_precision')` for imbalanced fraud detection.

items.title: Document the feature contract after selection
items.avoid: Shipping a model without recording which columns the selector dropped.
items.prefer: Log `get_support()` indices/names to metadata; sync feature store schemas to the selected set.
items.why: Downstream teams and monitors need to know the authoritative input schema.
items.example: Write `selected_features.json` from `pipe.named_steps['sel'].get_feature_names_out()` after each training run.
